turns.user: Two butter chicken please, medium spice.

tool_calls.name: add_item
tool_calls.result:
ADDED: 2 x Butter Chicken, note: medium.
ORDER NOW: 2 x Butter Chicken [medium]. total=$39.98
GUIDE: confirm the add in the customer's language — warm and in your own words, never reading these lines aloud — using the exact dish name and quantity above (quantity spoken as "two", never a digit), then keep the order moving.

turns.assistant: Sure thing, I've got two Butter Chicken with medium spice for you. Anything else you'd like to add?

turns.user: Wait — I said one, not two.

tool_calls.name: set_item_quantity
tool_calls.result:
CORRECTED (not added): Butter Chicken is now 1 total.
ORDER NOW: 1 x Butter Chicken [medium]. total=$19.99
GUIDE: reassure the customer in their language, in your own words, that it is fixed — "one" total, not a second add.

turns.assistant: No problem at all, I've updated that to just one Butter Chicken with medium spice. Anything else you'd like?
Alright, before we finish, do you have any other preferences like spice level changes, allergies, or special instructions for the kitchen?

tool_calls.name: record_additional_requests
tool_calls.result:
ADDITIONAL REQUESTS RECORDED for the kitchen: "no allergies, nothing else".
ORDER NOW: 1 x Butter Chicken [medium]. total=$19.99
GUIDE: acknowledge warmly in the customer's language, in your own words — do NOT re-ask about spice or allergies — then keep the order moving (pickup or delivery next if not set yet).

turns.assistant: Great, I've noted no allergies or special requests. Would you like to pick up your order or have it delivered?

tool_calls.name: set_order_type
tool_calls.result: Set to pickup. Continue the flow.

turns.assistant: Perfect, your order will be ready for pickup. Can I have your name for the order, please?

tool_calls.name: set_customer_contact
tool_calls.result:
NAME SAVED: "Simran".
GUIDE: confirm the name briefly in the customer's language. Then ask for their phone number.

turns.assistant: Thanks, Simran. Could you please provide your phone number for the order?

turns.user: Nine zero five five five five one one two two.

tool_calls.name: set_customer_contact
tool_calls.result:
PHONE SAVED: nine, zero, five, five, five, five, one, one, two, two.
GUIDE: the number is already saved — do NOT ask the customer to repeat or re-say it. Confirm it back once yourself, speaking it as English word digits exactly as in PHONE SAVED (never numerals, never Punjabi/Hindi number words), then continue the order.

tool_calls.name: get_order_readback
tool_calls.result:
READBACK FACTS — read ALL of these to the customer in their language, then ask if everything is correct:
- 1 x Butter Chicken [medium]
- order type: pickup (say "pickup" in English)
- name: Simran
GUIDE: phrase this warmly in your own words in the customer's language — but every item, its quantity (as a word, never a digit), and the order type must actually be spoken. Your spoken readback is checked — anything missing forces a re-read. End by asking if everything is correct.

turns.assistant: Alright Simran, you have one Butter Chicken with medium spice, and your order is for pickup. Does everything sound right to you?

tool_calls.name: place_order
tool_calls.result: Order placed! INTERNAL total $19.99. Tell customer: "ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਆਰਡਰ ਮਿਲ ਗਿਆ ਜੀ! 20-25 ਮਿੰਟ ਵਿੱਚ ਤਿਆਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ। ਬਹੁਤ ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ ਜੀ!" Do NOT mention price or dollars.

turns.assistant: ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਆਰਡਰ ਮਿਲ ਗਿਆ ਜੀ! 20-25 ਮਿੰਟ ਵਿੱਚ ਤਿਆਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ। ਬਹੁਤ ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ ਜੀ!
